mapper.select: SELECT c.card_id, c.card_name, c.card_type, c.company_name, c.brand_name, c.annual_fee_domestic, c.annual_fee_overseas, c.previous_month_spend, c.target_user, c.summary_description, b.benefit_title, b.benefit_type, b.discount_rate, b.cashback_rate, b.point_rate, b.display_text FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_BENEFITS b ON c.card_id = b.card_id WHERE c.visible_yn = 'Y' AND c.card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (b.visible_yn = 'Y' OR b.visible_yn IS NULL) ORDER BY c.card_id, b.display_order

SELECT c.card_id, c.card_name, c.card_type, c.company_name, c.brand_name, c.annual_fee_domestic, c.annual_fee_overseas, c.previous_month_spend, c.target_user, c.summary_description, cb.benefit_title, cb.benefit_type, cb.discount_rate, cb.cashback_rate, cb.point_rate, cb.display_text FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_BENEFITS cb ON c.card_id = cb.card_id WHERE c.card_id = #{cardId} AND c.card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.visible_yn = 'Y' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N'
